_comment: Labeled exemplars injected into the classifier prompt. Curate these over time. The learn-exemplars.sh script appends new exemplars when you manually set 'Correct route' in Twitter Insights. Keep this file under ~20 entries for prompt size.

exemplars.tweet: New MCP server for Figma just dropped — lets Claude Code read design specs directly from a selection. Repo link inside.
exemplars.rationale: MCP servers for dev tooling belong in Claude Setup; also worth a tool eval.

exemplars.tweet: Hot take: most 'AI agents' are just glorified if/else chains. The real unlock is long-horizon memory with user correction loops.
exemplars.rationale: Contrarian take that matches my voice (agents, memory, Lyra). Clear hook for a thread.

exemplars.tweet: Built a personal AI that runs my calendar, reminders, and ingests my bookmarks. Here's the architecture — gateway + routing + memory file.
exemplars.rationale: Directly adjacent to Lyra. Great teaching/example post material AND capability idea.

exemplars.tweet: Anthropic just shipped prompt caching with 90% cost reduction on repeated context. Docs: [link]
exemplars.rationale: Directly applicable to Lyra's cost profile; also a good 'how I cut costs 10x' post.

exemplars.tweet: Deep dive into how Cursor's agent mode actually works under the hood — 12-minute read.
exemplars.rationale: Long-form reading, no immediate action — saves for deep reading.

exemplars.tweet: Linear just launched AI triage. Auto-assigns, auto-labels, and suggests duplicates. Free tier available.
exemplars.rationale: Concrete tool to evaluate; also competitive signal in PM tooling space.

exemplars.tweet: The job market for senior AI engineers in Europe is brutal right now. 300+ applicants per role, most filtered by keyword match.
exemplars.rationale: Market intel relevant to job search; strong hook for a candid post.

exemplars.tweet: Thread: 5 prompts I run every Monday to plan my week. Includes the 'what would I regret not doing' question.
exemplars.rationale: Personal Claude workflow; also great inspiration for my own content on AI routines.
